---
title: "06.2 - MethylKit: DMRs
---

# Load libraries & data
```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(ggplot2)
library(methylKit)
library(pheatmap)
library(rcolorbrewer)
library(tidyverse)


# Load object 
load("output/methylkit/objects/methylkit_filtered.RData")


```

```{r}

# unite
meth <- unite(myobj_filtered, destrand = TRUE)

# define regions
# OPTION A (recommended first pass):
# Create regions from CpG positions themselves

gr <- as(meth, "GRanges")

# Example: cluster nearby CpGs into regions
# (simple approach: group CpGs within 500 bp)

regions <- reduce(gr, min.gapwidth = 500)

# summarize methylation over regions
region_meth <- regionCounts(
  myobj_filtered,
  regions
)

# unite regions
meth_regions <- unite(region_meth, destrand = TRUE)

# qc
PCASamples(meth_regions)

clusterSamples(meth_regions)

# dmr
diff_regions <- calculateDiffMeth(meth_regions)

# extract significant DMRs
dmr <- getMethylDiff(
  diff_regions,
  difference = 25,
  qvalue = 0.01
)

# save
write.csv(
  dmr,
  "output/methylkit/dmr/dmr_25pct_q001.csv"
)

# export
bed <- data.frame(
  chr = dmr$chr,
  start = dmr$start,
  end = dmr$end
)

write.table(
  bed,
  "output/methylkit/dmr/dmr_25pct_q001.bed",
  sep = "\t",
  quote = FALSE,
  row.names = FALSE,
  col.names = FALSE
)

```
